name: Umbral Reaver
description: Class that heavily relies on damage dealth over time and dodges

skills.name: Poisoned Blade
skills.description: Deal 50% of your damage over 3 seconds, but reduce damage dealt by weapon by 25%.

skills.name: Mirage
skills.description: 3/6/9/12/15% chance to dodge and completely ignore incoming damage

skills.name: Echo of Agony
skills.description: Critical damage deals 100% of target's incoming damage over time and removes it

skills.name: Shadow Counter
skills.description: After dodging an attack, your next attack deals double damage

skills.name: Sharp Edge
skills.description: Dealing critical damage inflicts bleed for 200% of your damage over 10 seconds

skills.name: Improved Ambush
skills.description: Ambush is 2 times more likely to hit critically

skills.name: Precise Counter
skills.description: After dodging an attack, your next attack has double chance to hit critically

skills.name: Insidious Killer
skills.description: Double 'damage over time effects' timers (lowers damage per second). Increase total damage done by 'damage over time effects' by 10/20/30%

skills.name: Shadow
skills.description: Increase dodge chance by 5/10/15%. Increase damage taken by 10%

skills.name: DoT Counter
skills.description: Apply all your 'damage over time effects' after dodging
